questionHtml: State the types of bonding in magnesium, oxygen and magnesium oxide, and how the valence electrons produce these types of bonding.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for all bonding types correct.

Award [1] for each correct description.

Apply ECF for M2 only once.
